main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'inadequate scale inhibitor + new phosphonate incompatibility with high hardness/TDS/low pH + progressive CaCO3' literal.

alternatives.justification: 5 alts (orgánico, MECH, dosis real, agua estacional).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar dosis 1.2→2.0 ppm + solicitar al proveedor dosis site-specific — operacional; CIP ácido no visible.

requested_data.justification: Pide SI CaCO3 y CaSO4 + LSI — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: ΔP no estabiliza + conductividad >100 µS/cm → switch.
